description_long: This is a vintage-style biplane with a green fuselage and dual stacked wings, each adorned with roundel insignias reminiscent of early 20th-century military aircraft. The wings are supported by dark brown struts, and the tail features a vertical stabilizer with a tricolor pattern of blue, white, and red. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing, with a visible seat and control area. At the front, a large wooden propeller is mounted, and the undercarriage consists of simple, fixed landing gear. The overall design is compact and stylized, evoking classic World War I-era fighter planes.
description: A green, vintage biplane with dual wings, open cockpit, and a wooden propeller, featuring roundel insignias and a tricolor tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green fuselage, stacked wings with roundels, open cockpit, and tricolor tail fin.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual wings, central cockpit, and large wooden propeller.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, showing the propeller and tail details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the open cockpit, tail assembly, and the back of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, mid-mounted wings supported by interplane struts; no winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles visible.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a rear skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing.
